proof: function[T0: lib(neg).Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Real, Real](f, x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1(x2) = const_add_left(x0, x1, x2) }(c, pointwise_neg[Real, Real](f), x)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](c, f(x))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { x0 - x1(x2) = const_sub_left(x0, x1, x2) }(c, f, x)

goal: const_sub_left(c, f, x) = const_add_left(c, pointwise_neg[Real, Real](f), x)

proof: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0(x1) + x2 = const_add_right(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, -c)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](f(x), c)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0(x1) - x2 = const_sub_right(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, c)
